title: iFrame behavior
description:
The merchant can specify here some custom look behaviors for the generated iFrame.

Important: custom_redirection_url is NOT the callback URL after a successful payment. The callback is done by MiPS to the IMN URL the merchant will provide us. The redirection url acts only as a success page for the user.

All these options are optional.

height.description: Height of the iframe in pixels

width.description: Width of the iframe in pixels

custom_redirection_url.description: The redirection page after a successful payment. A fail payment does not redirect. The try again option is displayed within the iframe
